channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 3015e5ed-6856-4ab3-b2f0-b8492aa30ca6
Display name: Azure Managed Redis Contributor
Description: Lets you manage Azure Managed Redis resources, but not access the data stored in them.
Link: https://management.azure.com/3015e5ed-6856-4ab3-b2f0-b8492aa30ca6?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 63342533-d951-495d-a3c3-a459aa02362b
Display name: Oracle Database DbSystems Administrator
Description: Grants full access to manage DbSystems resources
Link: https://management.azure.com/63342533-d951-495d-a3c3-a459aa02362b?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: f287ba2f-f923-4464-a5bd-721c3951d32d
Display name: Azure Managed Redis Reader
Description: Lets you view Azure Managed Redis resources, but not modify them or access keys or access to the data stored in them.
Link: https://management.azure.com/f287ba2f-f923-4464-a5bd-721c3951d32d?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Entra role
item.description:
Id: 1981f584-96e9-4a6f-95b0-f522373f8fae
Display name: Tenant Governance Administrator
Description: Manage all capabilities in the Microsoft Entra Tenant Governance service.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/1981f584-96e9-4a6f-95b0-f522373f8fae

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Entra role
item.description:
Id: e0a4caa6-fe82-443f-b92f-d87341d17b2e
Display name: Tenant Governance Reader
Description: Can read all tenant governance data.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/e0a4caa6-fe82-443f-b92f-d87341d17b2e

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Entra role
item.description:
Id: b8e31d83-1534-480f-9b10-0338ded51b7e
Display name: Tenant Governance Relationship Administrator
Description: Can initiate governance relationships and terminate them.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/b8e31d83-1534-480f-9b10-0338ded51b7e

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Entra role
item.description:
Id: 124577f8-48ed-456a-839f-13b419002e33
Display name: Tenant Governance Relationship Reader
Description: Can read tenant governance relationships and relevant objects.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/124577f8-48ed-456a-839f-13b419002e33
